title: dubrueilia inaequalis
intro: Dubrueilia inaequalis, also known as Inula helenium, is a perennial plant from the Asteraceae family, native to Europe and Asia, and is often used in traditional medicine. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which are believed to be responsible for its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Dubrueilia inaequalis include relief from digestive issues, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
